revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 大宮神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=東京都島嶼部}} |所在地 = [[東京都]][[大島町]][[野増村|野増]] (字大宮) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天照皇大神]]、阿治古命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 6月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} '''大宮神社'''（おおみやじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[大島町]]（[[伊豆大島]]）にある[[神社]]。
[[式内社]]である'''阿治古神社'''（あじこじんじゃ）に比定されている<ref name="geo">[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク</ref>。
== 概要 == 創建は不詳。元々は南方の山中にあった阿治古（あじこ）集落に鎮座していたが、度重なる噴火降灰を避け、室町時代（[[1466年]]）に現在地に遷座され、その際に[[天照皇大神]]が合祀されたとされる<ref name="geo"/><ref name="navi">[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[天照皇大神]] * 阿治古命（あじこのみこと） - [[事代主神]]（三島大明神）と后の一人・波布比咩命（はぶひめのみこと、羽分(はぶ)の大后、[[波布比咩命神社]]の祭神）との間の王子。
== 文化財 == * 野増大宮神社の十二座[[神楽]] - 町指定民俗文化財<ref name="geo"/>。 * 野増大宮の[[椎]]樹叢 - 都指定天然記念物<ref name="geo"/><ref name="navi"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[三原神社]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - 東京都神社庁（島嶼部特集版）
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]]

{{神社 |名称 = 大宮神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=東京都島嶼部}} |所在地 = [[東京都]][[大島町]][[野増村|野増]] (字大宮) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天照皇大神]]、阿治古命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 6月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} '''大宮神社'''（おおみやじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[大島町]]（[[伊豆大島]]）にある[[神社]]。
[[式内社]]である'''阿治古神社'''（あじこじんじゃ）に比定されている<ref name="geo">[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク</ref>。
== 概要 == 創建は不詳。元々は南方の山中にあった阿治古（あじこ）集落に鎮座していたが、度重なる噴火降灰を避け、室町時代（[[1466年]]）に現在地に遷座され、その際に[[天照皇大神]]が合祀されたとされる<ref name="geo"/><ref name="navi">[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[天照皇大神]] * 阿治古命（あじこのみこと） - [[事代主神]]（三島大明神）と后の一人・波布比咩命（はぶひめのみこと、羽分(はぶ)の大后、[[波布比咩命神社]]の祭神）との間の王子。
== 文化財 == * 野増大宮神社の十二座[[神楽]] - 町指定民俗文化財<ref name="geo"/>。 * 野増大宮の[[椎]]樹叢 - 都指定天然記念物<ref name="geo"/><ref name="navi"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[三原神社]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - 東京都神社庁（島嶼部特集版）
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 大宮神社 |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|大宮神社　一ノ鳥居]]
大宮神社　一ノ鳥居 |所在地 = [[東京都]][[大島町]][[野増村|野増]] (字大宮) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天照皇大神]]、阿治古命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 6月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} '''大宮神社'''（おおみやじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[大島町]]（[[伊豆大島]]）にある[[神社]]。 [[式内社]]である'''阿治古神社'''（あじこじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳。元々は南方の山中にあった阿治古（あじこ）集落に鎮座していたが、度重なる噴火降灰を避け、室町時代（[[1466年]]）に現在地に遷座され、その際に[[天照皇大神]]が合祀されたとされる[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ。 == 祭神 == * [[天照皇大神]] * 阿治古命（あじこのみこと） - [[事代主神]]（三島大明神）と后の一人・波布比咩命（はぶひめのみこと、羽分(はぶ)の大后、[[波布比咩命神社]]の祭神）との間の長子。弟は波治命（はじのみこと、[[波治加麻神社]]の祭神）。 == 文化財 == * 野増大宮神社の十二座[[神楽]] - 町指定民俗文化財。 * 野増大宮の[[椎]]樹叢 - 都指定天然記念物。 [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|なし|サムネイル|三の鳥居　奥は椎樹叢]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[三原神社]] == 外部リンク == * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - 東京都神社庁（島嶼部特集版） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 大宮神社 |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|大宮神社　一ノ鳥居]]

{{nihongo|'''Omiya Shrine'''|大宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{Expand Japanese|大宮神社 (大島町)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Omiya Shrine
| native_name = 大宮神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Omiya Shrine'''|大宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Omiya Shrine'''|大宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Omiya Shrine'''|大宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Omiya Shrine'''|大宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 7 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 大宮神社 |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|大宮神社　一ノ鳥居]]
大宮神社　一ノ鳥居 |所在地 = [[東京都]][[大島町]][[野増村|野増]] (字大宮) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天照皇大神]]、阿治古命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 6月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|三の鳥居　奥は椎樹叢]] '''大宮神社'''（おおみやじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[大島町]]（[[伊豆大島]]）にある[[神社]]。 [[式内社]]である'''阿治古神社'''（あじこじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳。元々は南方の山中にあった阿治古（あじこ）集落に鎮座していたが、度重なる噴火降灰を避け、室町時代（[[1466年]]）に現在地に遷座され、その際に[[天照皇大神]]が合祀されたとされる[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ。 == 祭神 == * [[天照皇大神]] * 阿治古命（あじこのみこと） - [[事代主神]]（三島大明神）と后の一人・波布比咩命（はぶひめのみこと、羽分(はぶ)の大后、[[波布比咩命神社]]の祭神）との間の長子。弟は波治命（はじのみこと、[[波治加麻神社]]の祭神）。 == 文化財 == * 野増大宮神社の十二座[[神楽]] - 町指定民俗文化財。 * 野増大宮の[[椎]]樹叢 - 都指定天然記念物。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[三原神社]] == 外部リンク == * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - 東京都神社庁（島嶼部特集版） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[大宮神社 (大島町)]] to [[Omiya Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Merging Japanese Wikipedia import with English content
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 大宮神社 |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|大宮神社　一ノ鳥居]]
大宮神社　一ノ鳥居 |所在地 = [[東京都]][[大島町]][[野増村|野増]] (字大宮) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天照皇大神]]、阿治古命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 6月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|三の鳥居　奥は椎樹叢]] '''大宮神社'''（おおみやじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[大島町]]（[[伊豆大島]]）にある[[神社]]。 [[式内社]]である'''阿治古神社'''（あじこじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳。元々は南方の山中にあった阿治古（あじこ）集落に鎮座していたが、度重なる噴火降灰を避け、室町時代（[[1466年]]）に現在地に遷座され、その際に[[天照皇大神]]が合祀されたとされる[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ。 == 祭神 == * [[天照皇大神]] * 阿治古命（あじこのみこと） - [[事代主神]]（三島大明神）と后の一人・波布比咩命（はぶひめのみこと、羽分(はぶ)の大后、[[波布比咩命神社]]の祭神）との間の長子。弟は波治命（はじのみこと、[[波治加麻神社]]の祭神）。 == 文化財 == * 野増大宮神社の十二座[[神楽]] - 町指定民俗文化財。 * 野増大宮の[[椎]]樹叢 - 都指定天然記念物。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[三原神社]] == 外部リンク == * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - 東京都神社庁（島嶼部特集版） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

[[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[JA:大宮神社 (大島町)]] {{wikidata link|Q131925939}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|大宮神社 (大島町)|version=105465185|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 大宮神社 |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|大宮神社　一ノ鳥居]]
大宮神社　一ノ鳥居 |所在地 = [[東京都]][[大島町]][[野増村|野増]] (字大宮) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天照皇大神]]、阿治古命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 6月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|三の鳥居　奥は椎樹叢]] '''大宮神社'''（おおみやじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[大島町]]（[[伊豆大島]]）にある[[神社]]。 [[式内社]]である'''阿治古神社'''（あじこじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳。元々は南方の山中にあった阿治古（あじこ）集落に鎮座していたが、度重なる噴火降灰を避け、室町時代（[[1466年]]）に現在地に遷座され、その際に[[天照皇大神]]が合祀されたとされる[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ。 == 祭神 == * [[天照皇大神]] * 阿治古命（あじこのみこと） - [[事代主神]]（三島大明神）と后の一人・波布比咩命（はぶひめのみこと、羽分(はぶ)の大后、[[波布比咩命神社]]の祭神）との間の長子。弟は波治命（はじのみこと、[[波治加麻神社]]の祭神）。 == 文化財 == * 野増大宮神社の十二座[[神楽]] - 町指定民俗文化財。 * 野増大宮の[[椎]]樹叢 - 都指定天然記念物。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[三原神社]] == 外部リンク == * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - 東京都神社庁（島嶼部特集版） ==End Japanese== [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

Izu Province]] [[JA:大宮神社 (大島町)]] {{wikidata link|Q131925939}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|大宮神社 (大島町)|version=105465185|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 大宮神社 |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|大宮神社　一ノ鳥居]]
大宮神社　一ノ鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|大島町|Q1204507}}{{jalink|野増村|Q11645296|野増}} (字大宮) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天照皇大神}}、阿治古命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 6月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|三の鳥居　奥は椎樹叢]] '''大宮神社'''（おおみやじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|大島町|Q1204507}}（{{jalink|伊豆大島|Q1070580}}）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿治古神社'''（あじこじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳。元々は南方の山中にあった阿治古（あじこ）集落に鎮座していたが、度重なる噴火降灰を避け、室町時代（{{jalink|1466年|Q6559}}）に現在地に遷座され、その際に{{jalink|天照皇大神}}が合祀されたとされる[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ。 == 祭神 == * {{jalink|天照皇大神}} * 阿治古命（あじこのみこと） - {{jalink|事代主神}}（三島大明神）と后の一人・波布比咩命（はぶひめのみこと、羽分(はぶ)の大后、{{jalink|波布比咩命神社|Q134930157}}の祭神）との間の長子。弟は波治命（はじのみこと、{{jalink|波治加麻神社|Q134930376}}の祭神）。 == 文化財 == * 野増大宮神社の十二座{{jalink|神楽|Q1348260}} - 町指定民俗文化財。 * 野増大宮の{{jalink|椎|Q11540757}}樹叢 - 都指定天然記念物。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * {{jalink|三原神社|Q134972440}} == 外部リンク == * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - 東京都神社庁（島嶼部特集版） ==End Japanese== [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

大宮神社　一ノ鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|大島町|Q1204507}}{{jalink|野増村|Q11645296|野増}} (字大宮) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天照皇大神}}、阿治古命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 6月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|三の鳥居　奥は椎樹叢]] '''大宮神社'''（おおみやじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|大島町|Q1204507}}（{{jalink|伊豆大島|Q1070580}}）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿治古神社'''（あじこじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク。 === 概要 === 創建は不詳。元々は南方の山中にあった阿治古（あじこ）集落に鎮座していたが、度重なる噴火降灰を避け、室町時代（{{jalink|1466年|Q6559}}）に現在地に遷座され、その際に{{jalink|天照皇大神}}が合祀されたとされる[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|天照皇大神}} * 阿治古命（あじこのみこと） - {{jalink|事代主神}}（三島大明神）と后の一人・波布比咩命（はぶひめのみこと、羽分(はぶ)の大后、{{jalink|波布比咩命神社|Q134930157}}の祭神）との間の長子。弟は波治命（はじのみこと、{{jalink|波治加麻神社|Q134930376}}の祭神）。 === 文化財 === * 野増大宮神社の十二座{{jalink|神楽|Q1348260}} - 町指定民俗文化財。 * 野増大宮の{{jalink|椎|Q11540757}}樹叢 - 都指定天然記念物。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|三原神社|Q134972440}} === 外部リンク === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - 東京都神社庁（島嶼部特集版） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]]

(大島町)]] {{wikidata link|Q131925939}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 大宮神社 |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|大宮神社　一ノ鳥居]]
大宮神社　一ノ鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|大島町|Q1204507}}{{jalink|野増村|Q11645296|野増}} (字大宮) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天照皇大神}}、阿治古命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 6月15日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=大宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|三の鳥居　奥は椎樹叢]] '''大宮神社'''（おおみやじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|大島町|Q1204507}}（{{jalink|伊豆大島|Q1070580}}）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿治古神社'''（あじこじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク。 === 概要 === 創建は不詳。元々は南方の山中にあった阿治古（あじこ）集落に鎮座していたが、度重なる噴火降灰を避け、室町時代（{{jalink|1466年|Q6559}}）に現在地に遷座され、その際に{{jalink|天照皇大神}}が合祀されたとされる[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|天照皇大神}} * 阿治古命（あじこのみこと） - {{jalink|事代主神}}（三島大明神）と后の一人・波布比咩命（はぶひめのみこと、羽分(はぶ)の大后、{{jalink|波布比咩命神社|Q134930157}}の祭神）との間の長子。弟は波治命（はじのみこと、{{jalink|波治加麻神社|Q134930376}}の祭神）。 === 文化財 === * 野増大宮神社の十二座{{jalink|神楽|Q1348260}} - 町指定民俗文化財。 * 野増大宮の{{jalink|椎|Q11540757}}樹叢 - 都指定天然記念物。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|三原神社|Q134972440}} === 外部リンク === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - 東京都神社庁（島嶼部特集版） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} * {{ill|Q135160342|lt=Q135160342|WD=Q135160342}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11380552|lt=Q11380552|WD=Q11380552}} ** Series ordinal: 35 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039658|lt=Q135039658|WD=Q135039658}} ** P156: {{ill|Ihatewakeno- Shrine|lt=Ihatewakeno- Shrine|WD=Q135039660}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q1204507|lt=Q1204507|WD=Q1204507}} * {{ill|Izu Province|lt=Izu Province|ar|مقاطعة إزو|be|Ідзу (правінцыя)|ckb|پارێزگای ئیزو|cs|Provincie Izu|cv|Идзу|de|Provinz Izu|en|Izu Province|es|Provincia de Izu|fa|ولایت ایزو|fr|Province d'Izu|gl|Provincia de Izu|hak|Yî-theu-koet|id|Provinsi Izu|it|Izu (provincia)|ja|伊豆国|ko|이즈국|lt|Idzu žemė|nl|Izu (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Izu|pt|Província de Izu|ru|Идзу (провинция)|simple|Izu Province|sk|Izu (provincia)|sr|Провинција Изу|th|แคว้นอิซุ|tr|Izu (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ідзу|zh_min_nan|Izu-kok|zh_yue|伊豆國|zh|伊豆國|WD=Q860928}} * {{ill|Q961511|lt=Q961511|WD=Q961511}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.733528|139.35806}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181603 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|lt=Q17|WD=Q17}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039659|lt=Q135039659|WD=Q135039659}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '東京都大島町野増 (字大宮)', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大宮神社 (大島町)]] {{wikidata link|Q131925939}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōmiya Shrine |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|Ōmiya Shrine first torii]]
Ōmiya Shrine first torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}{{jalink|Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507}}{{jalink|Nomashi Village|Q11645296|Nomashi}} (Ōmiya area) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Amaterasu|Q455602|Amaterasu-ōmikami}}, Ajiko-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = June 15 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ōmiya Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|Third torii, with the evergreen oak grove beyond]] '''Ōmiya Shrine''' (おおみやじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507}} ({{jalink|Izu Ōshima|Q1070580}}), {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Ajiko Shrine''' (あじこじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク. === Overview === Its founding is unknown. It was originally enshrined in the Ajiko settlement in the southern mountains, but to avoid repeated volcanic ashfall from eruptions it was moved to the current site in the Muromachi period ({{jalink|1466|Q6559}}), and at that time {{jalink|Amaterasu|Q455602|Amaterasu-ōmikami}} was additionally enshrined[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Amaterasu|Q455602|Amaterasu-ōmikami}} * Ajiko-no-Mikoto - eldest child between {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin) and one of his consorts, Habuhime-no-Mikoto ("Habu no Ōkisaki," enshrined at {{jalink|Habuhime Shrine|Q134930157}}). Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{jalink|Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{jalink|kagura|Q1348260}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{jalink|shii oak|Q11540757}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|Mihara Shrine|Q134972440}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

revision.comment: AI-assisted translation: Japanese wiki content translated by local AI agents (deepseek-r1:8b via Ollama, reviewed/assembled by Claude Code). Quality varies — some pages may contain subtle translation errors.

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: used local AI agents to translate these pages. Contrary to the description it was actually Claude Code for a few, OpenClaw with Codex, and regular Codex. Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{jalink|Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{jalink|kagura|Q1348260}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{jalink|shii oak|Q11540757}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|Mihara Shrine|Q134972440}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ōmiya Shrine first torii |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}{{jalink|Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507}}{{jalink|Nomashi Village|Q11645296|Nomashi}} (Ōmiya area) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Amaterasu|Q455602|Amaterasu-ōmikami}}, Ajiko-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}, former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = June 15 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ōmiya Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|Third torii, with the evergreen oak grove beyond]] '''Ōmiya Shrine''' (おおみやじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507}} ({{jalink|Izu Ōshima|Q1070580}}), {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Ajiko Shrine''' (あじこじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク. === Overview === Its founding is unknown. It was originally enshrined in the Ajiko settlement in the southern mountains, but to avoid repeated volcanic ashfall from eruptions it was moved to the current site in the Muromachi period ({{jalink|1466|Q6559}}), and at that time {{jalink|Amaterasu|Q455602|Amaterasu-ōmikami}} was additionally enshrined[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Amaterasu|Q455602|Amaterasu-ōmikami}} * Ajiko-no-Mikoto - eldest child between {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin) and one of his consorts, Habuhime-no-Mikoto ("Habu no Ōkisaki," enshrined at {{jalink|Habuhime Shrine|Q134930157}}). Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{jalink|Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{jalink|kagura|Q1348260}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{jalink|shii oak|Q11540757}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|Mihara Shrine|Q134972440}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]]

Ōmiya Shrine first torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}{{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507}}{{ill|lt=Nomashi Village|Q11645296|WD=Q11645296|lt=Nomashi}} (Ōmiya area) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}}, Ajiko-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = June 15 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ōmiya Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|Third torii, with the evergreen oak grove beyond]] '''Ōmiya Shrine''' (おおみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507}} ({{ill|lt=Izu Ōshima|Q1070580|WD=Q1070580}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Ajiko Shrine''' (あじこじんじゃ), a {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク. === Overview === Its founding is unknown. It was originally enshrined in the Ajiko settlement in the southern mountains, but to avoid repeated volcanic ashfall from eruptions it was moved to the current site in the Muromachi period ({{ill|lt=1466|Q6559|WD=Q6559}}), and at that time {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}} was additionally enshrined[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}} * Ajiko-no-Mikoto - eldest child between {{ill|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin) and one of his consorts, Habuhime-no-Mikoto ("Habu no Ōkisaki," enshrined at {{ill|lt=Habuhime Shrine|Q134930157|WD=Q134930157}}). Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{ill|lt=Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376|WD=Q134930376}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{ill|lt=kagura|Q1348260|WD=Q1348260}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{ill|lt=shii oak|Q11540757|WD=Q11540757}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Mihara Shrine|Q134972440|WD=Q134972440}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Ōmiya Shrine first torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}{{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507}}{{ill|lt=Nomashi Village|Q11645296|WD=Q11645296|lt=Nomashi}} (Ōmiya area) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}}, Ajiko-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = June 15 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ōmiya Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|Third torii, with the evergreen oak grove beyond]] '''Ōmiya Shrine''' (おおみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507}} ({{ill|lt=Izu Ōshima|Q1070580|WD=Q1070580}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Ajiko Shrine''' (あじこじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク. === Overview === Its founding is unknown. It was originally enshrined in the Ajiko settlement in the southern mountains, but to avoid repeated volcanic ashfall from eruptions it was moved to the current site in the Muromachi period ({{ill|lt=1466|Q6559|WD=Q6559}}), and at that time {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}} was additionally enshrined[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}} * Ajiko-no-Mikoto - eldest child between {{ill|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin) and one of his consorts, Habuhime-no-Mikoto ("Habu no Ōkisaki," enshrined at {{ill|lt=Habuhime Shrine|Q134930157|WD=Q134930157}}). Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{ill|lt=Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376|WD=Q134930376}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{ill|lt=kagura|Q1348260|WD=Q1348260}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{ill|lt=shii oak|Q11540757|WD=Q11540757}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Mihara Shrine|Q134972440|WD=Q134972440}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It was originally enshrined in the Ajiko settlement in the southern mountains, but to avoid repeated volcanic ashfall from eruptions it was moved to the current site in the Muromachi period ({{ill|lt=1466|Q6559|WD=Q6559}}), and at that time {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}} was additionally enshrined[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami}} * Ajiko-no-Mikoto - eldest child between {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611}} (Mishima Daimyōjin) and one of his consorts, Habuhime-no-Mikoto ("Habu no Ōkisaki," enshrined at {{ill|lt=Habuhime Shrine|Q134930157|WD=Q134930157}}). Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{ill|lt=Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376|WD=Q134930376}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{ill|lt=kagura|Q1348260|WD=Q1348260}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{ill|lt=shii oak|Q11540757|WD=Q11540757}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Mihara Shrine|Q134972440|WD=Q134972440}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōmiya Shrine |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|Ōmiya Shrine first torii]]
Ōmiya Shrine first torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507|1=Ōshima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Nomashi Village|Q11645296|WD=Q11645296|lt=Nomashi|1=Nomashi}} (Ōmiya area) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}}, Ajiko-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = June 15 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ōmiya Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|Third torii, with the evergreen oak grove beyond]] '''Ōmiya Shrine''' (おおみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507|1=Ōshima, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Izu Ōshima|Q1070580|WD=Q1070580|1=Izu Ōshima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Ajiko Shrine''' (あじこじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク. === Overview === Its founding is unknown. It was originally enshrined in the Ajiko settlement in the southern mountains, but to avoid repeated volcanic ashfall from eruptions it was moved to the current site in the Muromachi period ({{ill|lt=1466|Q6559|WD=Q6559|1=1466}}), and at that time {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} was additionally enshrined[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} * Ajiko-no-Mikoto - eldest child between {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} (Mishima Daimyōjin) and one of his consorts, Habuhime-no-Mikoto ("Habu no Ōkisaki," enshrined at {{ill|lt=Habuhime Shrine|Q134930157|WD=Q134930157|1=Habuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine}}). Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{ill|lt=Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376|WD=Q134930376|1=Hajikama Shrine}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{ill|lt=kagura|Q1348260|WD=Q1348260|1=Kagura}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{ill|lt=shii oak|Q11540757|WD=Q11540757|1=Japanese ship Shii}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Mihara Shrine|Q134972440|WD=Q134972440|1=Mihara Shrine}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) {{DEFAULTSORT:おおみやしんしや おおしままち}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It is identified with '''Ajiko Shrine''' (あじこじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク. === Overview === Its founding is unknown. It was originally enshrined in the Ajiko settlement in the southern mountains, but to avoid repeated volcanic ashfall from eruptions it was moved to the current site in the Muromachi period ({{ill|lt=1466|Q6559|WD=Q6559|1=1466}}), and at that time {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} was additionally enshrined[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} * Ajiko-no-Mikoto - eldest child between {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} (Mishima Daimyōjin) and one of his consorts, Habuhime-no-Mikoto ("Habu no Ōkisaki," enshrined at {{ill|lt=Habuhime Shrine|Q134930157|WD=Q134930157|1=Habuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine}}). Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{ill|lt=Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376|WD=Q134930376|1=Hajikama Shrine}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{ill|lt=kagura|Q1348260|WD=Q1348260|1=Kagura}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{ill|lt=shii oak|Q11540757|WD=Q11540757|1=Japanese ship Shii}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Mihara Shrine|Q134972440|WD=Q134972440|1=Mihara Shrine}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická Izu|cv|Идзу|de|Provinz Izu|en|Izu Province|es|Provincia de Izu|fa|ولایت ایزو|fr|Province d'Izu|gl|Provincia de Izu|hak|Yî-theu-koet|id|Provinsi Izu|it|Izu (provincia)|ja|伊豆国|ko|이즈국|lt|Idzu žemė|nl|Izu Ідзу|zh_min_nan|Izu-kok|zh_yue|伊豆國|zh|伊豆國|WD=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} * {{ill|Q961511|ltq=Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.733528|139.35806}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181603 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|WD=Q17|1=Japan}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039659|ltq=Q135039659|WD=Q135039659|1=Achiko Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '東京都大島町野増 (字大宮)', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大宮神社 (大島町)]] {{wikidata link|Q131925939}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Ōmiya Shrine |画像= [[File:Oshima Shrine 1st gate.jpg|250px|Ōmiya Shrine first torii]]
Ōmiya Shrine first torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507|1=Ōshima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Nomashi Village|Q11645296|WD=Q11645296|lt=Nomashi|1=Nomashi}} (Ōmiya area) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}}, Ajiko-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = June 15 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ōmiya Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|Third torii, with the evergreen oak grove beyond]] '''Ōmiya Shrine''' (おおみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507|1=Ōshima, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Izu Ōshima|Q1070580|WD=Q1070580|1=Izu Ōshima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Ajiko Shrine''' (あじこじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク. === Overview === Its founding is unknown. It was originally enshrined in the Ajiko settlement in the southern mountains, but to avoid repeated volcanic ashfall from eruptions it was moved to the current site in the Muromachi period ({{ill|lt=1466|Q6559|WD=Q6559|1=1466}}), and at that time {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} was additionally enshrined[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} * Ajiko-no-Mikoto - eldest child between {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} (Mishima Daimyōjin) and one of his consorts, Habuhime-no-Mikoto ("Habu no Ōkisaki," enshrined at {{ill|lt=Habuhime Shrine|Q134930157|WD=Q134930157|1=Habuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine}}). Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{ill|lt=Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376|WD=Q134930376|1=Hajikama Shrine}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{ill|lt=kagura|Q1348260|WD=Q1348260|1=Kagura}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{ill|lt=shii oak|Q11540757|WD=Q11540757|1=Japanese ship Shii}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Mihara Shrine|Q134972440|WD=Q134972440|1=Mihara Shrine}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]]

Ōmiya Shrine first torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507|1=Ōshima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Nomashi Village|Q11645296|WD=Q11645296|lt=Nomashi|1=Nomashi}} (Ōmiya area) |位置 = {{Coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}}, Ajiko-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = June 15 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Ōmiya Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|44|0.7|N|139|21|29|E}}}} }} [[ファイル:Oshima Shrine's Third Torii Gate.jpg|サムネイル|右|Third torii, with the evergreen oak grove beyond]] '''Ōmiya Shrine''' (おおみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōshima, Tokyo|Q1204507|WD=Q1204507|1=Ōshima, Tokyo}} ({{ill|lt=Izu Ōshima|Q1070580|WD=Q1070580|1=Izu Ōshima}}), {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Ajiko Shrine''' (あじこじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://izuoshima-geo.org/know/highlights/culturalsite/bunkasite-12.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ジオパーク. === Overview === Its founding is unknown. It was originally enshrined in the Ajiko settlement in the southern mountains, but to avoid repeated volcanic ashfall from eruptions it was moved to the current site in the Muromachi period ({{ill|lt=1466|Q6559|WD=Q6559|1=1466}}), and at that time {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} was additionally enshrined[https://oshima-navi.com/shrine/shrine003.html 大宮神社] - 伊豆大島ナビ. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} * Ajiko-no-Mikoto - eldest child between {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} (Mishima Daimyōjin) and one of his consorts, Habuhime-no-Mikoto ("Habu no Ōkisaki," enshrined at {{ill|lt=Habuhime Shrine|Q134930157|WD=Q134930157|1=Habuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine}}). Younger brother: Haji-no-Mikoto (enshrined at {{ill|lt=Hajikama Shrine|Q134930376|WD=Q134930376|1=Hajikama Shrine}}). === Cultural properties === * Twelve-seat {{ill|lt=kagura|Q1348260|WD=Q1348260|1=Kagura}} of Nomashi Ōmiya Shrine - town-designated folk cultural property. * Evergreen {{ill|lt=shii oak|Q11540757|WD=Q11540757|1=Japanese ship Shii}} grove of Nomashi Ōmiya - Tokyo-designated natural monument. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Mihara Shrine|Q134972440|WD=Q134972440|1=Mihara Shrine}} === External links === * [http://tosho.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/ooshima_01.html 大宮神社] - Tokyo Shrine Association (Island Area Feature) == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Omiya Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:大島町の建築物]] [[Category:大島町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]]
